items.markdown:
![Google Analytics Template - Power My Analytics](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120925-3675-0139-0000-6f3ca41504ec:4)
Use Looker Studio or [Google Sheets](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/) to access pre-built Google Analytics 4 (GA4) templates to automate, visualize, and share metrics such as user acquisition, conversion rates, engagement, and traffic sources . These templates offer customized dashboards and AI-powered insights, saving time on manual reporting for clients or projects.[](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/) [[1]](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/)[[2]](https://www.semrush.com/my_reports/lp/report-templates/google-analytics-report/)[[3]](https://datastudio.google.com/gallery)[[4]](https://windsor.ai/template-gallery/ga4-dashboard-reports/)[[5]](https://whatagraph.com/templates/google-analytics-4-report)

**Key Types of GA4 Report Templates:** 

- **[Website & Marketing Performance](https://datastudio.google.com/gallery):** Focuses on high-level KPIs like traffic sources, user behavior, and engagement, ideal for quick overviews.
- **[E-commerce Sales Report](https://dashthis.com/blog/google-analytics-reports-for-marketers/):** Tracks revenue, conversions, average order value, and product performance.
- **[Acquisition & Traffic Source Report](https://www.ninjacat.io/report-templates/google-analytics-report-template):** Analyzes where users come from (organic, paid, social) to evaluate marketing channel efficiency.
- **[Behavior/Content Report](https://portermetrics.com/en/templates/google-analytics-website-performance-report-template/):** Details page views, time on page, and bounce rates for content optimization.[](https://datastudio.google.com/gallery) [[1]](https://datastudio.google.com/gallery)[[2]](https://dashthis.com/blog/google-analytics-reports-for-marketers/)[[3]](https://www.ninjacat.io/report-templates/google-analytics-report-template)[[4]](https://portermetrics.com/en/templates/google-analytics-website-performance-report-template/)[[5]](https://portermetrics.com/en/templates/)

**Where to Find Top Templates (2026):** 

- **Looker Studio Gallery:** Google's official gallery offers free, customizable templates from various partners, including specific ones for Nonprofits (e.g., Whole Whale).
- **Porter Metrics:** Provides highly visual, tailored GA4 templates for agencies.
- **[DashThis](https://dashthis.com/ga4-report-template/):** Offers automated, all-in-one dashboards designed for easy client reporting.
- **[Whatagraph](https://whatagraph.com/templates/google-analytics-4-report):** Specializes in drag-and-drop report builders.
- **[Windsor.ai](https://windsor.ai/template-gallery/ga4-dashboard-reports/):** Provides marketing dashboards that combine GA4 with other data sources.[](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/) [[1]](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/)[[2]](https://datastudio.google.com/gallery)[[3]](https://dashthis.com/ga4-report-template/)[[4]](https://whatagraph.com/templates/google-analytics-4-report)[[5]](https://windsor.ai/template-gallery/ga4-dashboard-reports/)

**Customizing Your Report:** 

- **Create in GA4:** Use the "Library" feature to customize detail reports and save them as templates.
- **Report Snapshot:** Select pre-built snapshot templates for immediate insights, tailored to your business goals.
- **Custom Dimensions/Metrics:** Modify templates by adding brand logos, specific colors, and specific metrics (e.g., sessions, conversions, pageviews).[](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/13844077?hl=en) [[1]](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/13844077?hl=en)[[2]](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/16081004?hl=en)[[3]](https://www.semrush.com/my_reports/lp/report-templates/google-analytics-report/)[[4]](https://improvado.io/blog/google-analytics-dashboard)[[5]](https://portermetrics.com/en/report-templates/google-analytics-4/)

How to create a Google Analytics report?

expanded_element.title: [GA4] Create an overview report - Analytics Help
expanded_element.description:
In Google Analytics, click Reports. ...
In the left navigation, click Library on the bottom left. ...
In the 'Reports' section, click + Create new report > Create overview report.
Click + Add cards.
Select up to 16 summary cards. ...
To arrange the summary cards in the report, drag and drop a summary card on the right.

items.title: What are the three different types of reports in Google Analytics?

expanded_element.title: 3 Google Analytics 4 Reports that you need to know - Advance Metrics
expanded_element.description:
Traffic acquisition: This report provides you with a good overview of the channels that direct visitors to your website. ...
Events report: The events report allows you to analyze user behavior on your website in detail. ...
Conversion report: Focus on your marketing goals with this report!

expanded_element.title: Overview of Google Analytics reports
expanded_element.description: Google Analytics collects data from your websites and apps to create reports that provide insights into your business.

items.title: How to customize reports in Google Analytics?

expanded_element.title: [GA4] Customize detail reports - Analytics Help
expanded_element.description:
When viewing a detail report, click. in the top right. ...
Under the 'REPORT DATA' header, select Dimensions. ...
Under the 'PRIMARY DIMENSIONS' header, you can manage the dimensions drop-down. ...
Click Apply to apply the changes.
Click Save > Save changes to current report to save the changes to the report.
